CHUNK REFERENCE FOR EVALUATION DATASET CREATION
================================================================================

chunk_0:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
HealthGuard Select PPO Plan
Plan Overview
HealthGuard Select PPO is a comprehensive health insurance plan offering flexible provider access with
enhanced coverage for in-network care. The plan year runs from January 1 through December 31. Members
receive a personalized ID card within 10 business days of enrollment confirmation. This plan is administered by
HealthGuard Insurance Group and is available to eligible employees and their dependents.
Cost Structure
Individual Annual Deductible: $1,500
Family Annual Deductible: $3,000
Individual Out-of-Pocket Maximum: $6,000
Family Out-of-Pocket Maximum: $12,000
Deductibles apply to most medical services except preventive care. The out-of-pocket maximum includes
deductibles, copays, and coinsurance but excludes premiums and non-covered services. Once the
out-of-pocket maximum is reached, the plan covers 100% of eligible expenses for the remainder of the plan
year.
Medical Benefits
Primary Care Physician Visits: $25 copay per visit, deductible 

================================================================================

chunk_1:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
nce the
out-of-pocket maximum is reached, the plan covers 100% of eligible expenses for the remainder of the plan
year.
Medical Benefits
Primary Care Physician Visits: $25 copay per visit, deductible waived
Specialist Visits: $50 copay per visit, deductible waived
Urgent Care: $75 copay per visit, deductible waived
Emergency Room Services: $350 copay, waived if admitted; deductible applies after copay
Inpatient Hospital Services: 20% coinsurance after deductible
Outpatient Surgery: 20% coinsurance after deductible
Diagnostic Lab and X-Ray: $0 copay for in-network preventive labs; 20% coinsurance after deductible for
diagnostic tests
All preventive care services recommended by the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force are covered at 100%
when using in-network providers, with no deductible or copay required.
Prescription Benefits
Tier 1 (Generic): $10 copay for 30-day supply
Tier 2 (Preferred Brand): $40 copay for 30-day supply
Tier 3 (Non-Preferred Brand): $70 copay for 30-day supply
Tier

================================================================================

chunk_2:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
copay required.
Prescription Benefits
Tier 1 (Generic): $10 copay for 30-day supply
Tier 2 (Preferred Brand): $40 copay for 30-day supply
Tier 3 (Non-Preferred Brand): $70 copay for 30-day supply
Tier 4 (Specialty): 25% coinsurance up to $250 maximum per prescription
Mail-order prescriptions for 90-day supplies receive a 20% discount on copays. Prior authorization is required
for all Tier 4 specialty medications and must be obtained before filling the prescription. Prescriptions filled at
out-of-network pharmacies are subject to the deductible and 40% coinsurance.


Eligibility & Enrollment
Employees are eligible for coverage on the first day of the month following 30 days of continuous employment.
Enrollment must be completed within 31 days of becoming eligible. Dependent coverage extends to spouses
and unmarried children under age 26. The annual open enrollment period runs from November 1 through
November 30, with coverage changes effective January 1.
Qualifying life events—including

================================================================================

chunk_3:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 to spouses
and unmarried children under age 26. The annual open enrollment period runs from November 1 through
November 30, with coverage changes effective January 1.
Qualifying life events—including marriage, birth, adoption, or loss of other coverage—trigger a special
enrollment period of 60 days from the event date.
Provider Network
The HealthGuard Select network includes over 42,000 physicians and 850 hospitals nationwide. In-network
care is subject to the cost-sharing outlined above. Out-of-network care is subject to a separate $3,000 individual
deductible, $6,000 family deductible, and 40% coinsurance with no out-of-pocket maximum protection.
Members do not need referrals to see specialists within the network. To verify provider participation, use the
online directory at healthguard.com/findcare or call Member Services.
Claims & Support Information
Claims for in-network services are filed directly by providers. Members must submit out-of-network claims within
90 days of service 

================================================================================

chunk_4:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
.com/findcare or call Member Services.
Claims & Support Information
Claims for in-network services are filed directly by providers. Members must submit out-of-network claims within
90 days of service using Form HG-2024. Claims appeals must be filed within 180 days of the initial claim
decision.
Member Services Phone: 1-800-555-4793
Hours: Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST
Pharmacy Support: 1-800-555-4794
Online Portal: my.healthguard.com
Members may request an expedited appeal review for urgent medical situations, which will be resolved within
72 hours of receipt.


================================================================================
